title: SPOT-OD v1.3.1 edge-only residual-refinement release sync
description: SPOT-OD v1.3.1-edge-only-residual-refine-sync is a forward synchronization/correction release for the v1.3.0 edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement package. It preserves the train-loss-selected edge-only attention residual-refine result from v1.3.0: all non-development runs reach 373.728 m versus the best retained candidate at 459.591 m, an 18.682% gain, and versus the matched edge-only local/no-message control at 562.030 m, a 33.504% advantage; fresh seeds 151/157/163/167 reach 364.229 m versus the best retained candidate at 445.943 m, an 18.324% gain, and versus the matched local control at 814.283 m, a 55.270% advantage. The edge-only mean graph remains a closer but weaker mixed result at 386.224 m across all non-development runs and 380.065 m on fresh seeds. This release fixes and supersedes v1.3.0 packaging/synchronization issues by carrying synchronized release metadata, manifest, rebuilt PDFs, reviewer/independent-machine documentation, and manifest coverage for paper/tables/main_row_weighted_dls_poc.tex. It does not promote the validation-selected val53 branch and includes no val53 artifacts. Evidence scope remains limited to retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence; graph-path isolation is only against the matched edge-only no-message local control. This release is not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not a full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.
notes: This v1.3.1 release is a forward sync/correction release, not a new learned-method science claim. It preserves the v1.3.0 train-loss-selected edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement result for tag v1.3.1-edge-only-residual-refine-sync. Edge-only attention residual-refine reaches 373.728 m across all non-development runs versus the best retained candidate at 459.591 m (18.682% gain) and versus the matched edge-only local/no-message control at 562.030 m (33.504% advantage). Fresh seeds 151/157/163/167 reach 364.229 m versus the best retained candidate at 445.943 m (18.324% gain) and versus the matched local control at 814.283 m (55.270% advantage). The edge-only mean graph is closer but weaker mixed evidence at 386.224 m all non-development and 380.065 m fresh. The concept DOI remains 10.5281/zenodo.20768672. No DOI is asserted for v1.3.1 in this metadata before Zenodo import. DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20842573 is cited as the prior v1.3.0 version. Scope limits: retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence only; graph-path isolation only against the matched edge-only no-message local control; not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.
